description.en: A string giving the dependent locality or sublocality within a city, for example, a neighborhood, borough, district, or UK dependent locality.

excerpt.es: A string giving the dependent locality or sublocality within a city, for example, a neighborhood, borough, district, or UK dependent locality.
excerpt.en: A string giving the dependent locality or sublocality within a city, for example, a neighborhood, borough, district, or UK dependent locality.

description.en: Returns a JSON-serializable object that provides a payment method specific message used by the merchant to process the transaction and determine successful fund transfer. The contents of the object depend on the payment method being used. Developers need to consult whomever controls the URL for the expected shape of the details object.
